title: Camp
description: A cluster of proposed solutions sharing a core claim. Camps are presented neutrally. Migrated from content/auckland/schema/camp.schema.json. Structural changes: (1) evidence_ids → claim_ids (E_evidenced_by); (2) applicable_in and efficacy_in added as Region-list fields, lifted to edges at graph-build time (ratified 2026-04-25, CLAUDE.md §5 row 9e); (3) theme added. Intra-entity: flagship_moves ≥1, tensions ≥1, interventions ≥1 (camp_completeness_v1, P4 partial — cross-entity Driver/Camp/Claim existence is Python). Symmetry of tensions_with enforced by Python (P18).

core_claim.description: The defining proposition of this Camp. Must not contain banned weasel verbs (lint TBD by PI).

flagship_moves.description: Headline interventions that characterise this Camp. ≥1 required (P4).

tensions.description: Internal trade-offs or known downsides of this Camp's approach. ≥1 required (P4).

addresses.description: Problems this Camp targets. ≥1 required (P4, cross-entity Python). Materialises to E_addresses.

interventions.description: Structured interventions proposed by this Camp. ≥1 required (P4, camp_completeness_v1). expected_sign operationalises camp_intervention_sign_v1.

state_variable.description: State variable from the Problem's systems_model that this intervention acts on.

constraint_relaxed.description: Constraint from the Problem's systems_model that this intervention relaxes.

expected_sign.description: Directional effect on state_variable (camp_intervention_sign_v1). '+' = increase, '-' = decrease, '0' = neutral, '?' = unknown.

advocates.description: Named advocates or organisations associated with this Camp (freetext; typed Actor references use actor_ids).

actor_ids.description: Typed Actor references for named advocates. Parallel to advocates freetext.

claim_ids.description: Claims supporting this Camp. Materialises to E_evidenced_by.

tensions_with.description: Other Camp IDs in tension with this one. Symmetric relation; P18 (Python) enforces closure at graph-build time. Authors need only declare one direction.

applicable_in.description: Regions where this Camp's approach is applicable. Lifted from inline YAML field to graph edge at build time (E_applicable_in), ratified 2026-04-25.

efficacy_in.description: Regions where this Camp has demonstrated efficacy. Lifted to edge (E_efficacy_in) at graph-build time, ratified 2026-04-25.
